changes: Royal Authority: Potency increased from 180 to 200; Combo potency increased from 440 to 460.

Shifu: Potency reduced from 160 to 140; Combo potency reduced from 320 to 300.

Despair: Potency increased from 340 to 350.
High Thunder: Potency reduced from 200 to 150; DoT potency increased from 55 to 60.

Umbral Impulse: Potency increased from 600 to 620.
Sunflare: Potency increased from 600 to 700.
Contre Sixte: Potency increased from 400 to 420.

new_content.name: AAC Light-heavyweight Tier (Savage)
new_content.description: A high-difficulty raid dungeon consisting of four encounters (M1-M4) that can only be accessed via the Raid Finder. Rewards include Dark Horse Champion's Coffers and tokens for gear exchange.

new_content.name: Cenote Ja Ja Gural
new_content.description: A treasure dungeon featuring a series of chambers sealed behind stone doors. Choosing the correct door allows progress to further chambers and treasures; selecting the wrong door triggers a trap.
new_content.location: Unknown (Accessed via treasure coffers from br'aaxskin treasure maps)

new_content.name: Allagan tomestones of heliometry
new_content.description: A new currency for high-level gear exchange and enhancement.
new_content.npc_location: Zircon (Exchange) and Theone (Enhancement) in Solution Nine

new_content.name: The Neoteric Witch
new_content.description: A quest that must be completed to unlock access to the AAC Light-heavyweight Tier (Savage).

new_content.name: Data Center Travel and World Visit systems
new_content.description: Login caps for these travel systems are now tied to World classification (Standard, New, Preferred, Congested).

housing.name: Alzadaal's Garden Lamp
housing.description: An outdoor lighting fixture of the same ancient Hannish design encountered in the remnants above Alzadaal's Legacy.

housing.name: Il Mheg Arbor
housing.description: The vibrant flowers of this elegant garden decoration put one in mind of the faeries' colorful homeland. Pixies thankfully not included.

housing.name: Hyperboreia Bench
housing.description: This circular bench imitates a design seen in Ktisis Hyperboreia, complete with planted vegetation.

housing.name: Pile of Gold
housing.description: Nothing screams affluence (and the fragility of one's ego) like an overflowing mountain of silver and gold. Whether it truly is as valuable as it looks will always depend on the market.

housing.name: Goblet Phasmascape
housing.description: This advanced magitek contraption displays a breathtaking view of the Goblet in all its splendor.

housing.name: Lavender Beds Phasmascape
housing.description: This advanced magitek contraption displays a picturesque cluster of hillside houses at the Lavender Beds.

housing.name: Mist Phasmascape
housing.description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the community of Mist and the stunning stretch of coastline it sits atop.

housing.name: Shirogane Phasmascape
housing.description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the vibrant rooves and tree-topped outcrops of Shirogane.

housing.name: Empyreum Phasmascape
housing.description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the ornate, pointed spires that punctuate the Empyreum skyline.

housing.name: Aitiascope Desk
housing.description: Simple, unadorned work desks such as this are used to make observations in the Aitiascope. Includes a monitor for keeping track of aetheric fluctuations.

housing.name: Aitiascope Lamp
housing.description: A softly glowing lamp of the kind used to provide illumination in the depths of the Aitiascope.

housing.name: Sake Barrel
housing.description: This barrel of sake is wrapped in a mat of woven rice straw. A specialty product of Hingashi.

housing.name: Decorative Hingan Door
housing.description: A window crafted to resemble a Hingan-style sliding door.

glamour.name: Scientist's Monocle
glamour.description: Head piece, Item Level: 1 / Equipment Level: 1

glamour.name: Scientist's Coat
glamour.description: Body piece, Item Level: 1 / Equipment Level: 1

glamour.name: Scientist's Gloves
glamour.description: Hands piece, Item Level: 1 / Equipment Level: 1

glamour.name: Scientist's Breeches
glamour.description: Legs piece, Item Level: 1 / Equipment Level: 1

glamour.name: Scientist's Boots
glamour.description: Feet piece, Item Level: 1 / Equipment Level: 1

glamour.name: Ribboned Parasol
glamour.description: Embellished with an array of red ribbons, this understated parasol is perfect for adding a splash of elegance to a rainy day ensemble.
